onboardingFirstMessage.translation:
There is no instant preview.
You won’t see the result until the entire roll is developed

onboardingSecondMessage.translation:
Each roll is limited to 36 exposures.
Once finished, the film is sent to the lab for processing

onboardingSendStepMessage.translation: Once sent to print, your roll will be locked and processed

onboardingCountdownMessage.translation:
Calibrating digital negatives.
This will take a moment

onboardingGoToAlbumTitle.translation: Your frame is ready for review

onboardingGoToAlbumMessage.translation: Tap to open the digital archive and see your captured moments

onboardingAlbumMessage.translation: Pick a camera and start your own custom roll anytime

onboardingCameraGoBackTitle.translation: No preview, just live in the moment!

onboardingCameraExitTitle.translation: Do you want to finish it?

onboardingCameraExitMessage.translation: Do you want to skip the app introduction and discover it for yourself?
